mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ALARM_SETTING WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_setting ( user_id, family_alarm, user_alarm, policy_change_alarm, policy_limit_alarm, permission_alarm, question_alarm, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_setting SET ${columnName} = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
